events.title: Palm Sunday at the National Shrine
events.notes: 9am & 10:30am & 2pm Holy Mass with Distribution of Palms. 1pm Eucharistic Adoration & Confessions. 1:30pm Rosary for Life. 3pm Chaplet of Divine Mercy, Benediction, Blessing of Religious Articles, Blessing with Relic of St. Faustina. Confessions also at 3:30pm.
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Holy Thursday — Mass of the Lord's Supper
events.notes: 3pm Chaplet of Divine Mercy (no Benediction). 7:30pm Mass of the Lord's Supper (Livestreamed).
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Good Friday Services
events.notes: 12pm St. Faustina's Way of the Cross (Outdoors, weather permitting). 3pm Celebration of the Passion (Holy Communion distributed, Livestreamed). 7pm Solemn Divine Mercy Novena Day 1 (Livestreamed). 7:45pm Tenebrae (Meditation on the Seven Last Words of Christ). Confessions 1-2pm.
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Holy Saturday — Easter Vigil Mass
events.notes: 3pm Solemn Divine Mercy Novena Day 2 (no Benediction, Livestreamed). 10pm Easter Vigil Mass.
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Easter Sunday Masses
events.notes: 9am Easter Sunday Mass (Livestreamed). 10:30am Easter Sunday Mass. 2pm Easter Sunday Mass. 3pm Solemn Novena to the Divine Mercy (Livestreamed). Confessions 3:30-4:15pm only (no 1pm confessions).
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Solemn Novena to the Divine Mercy
events.notes: Daily at 3pm (except Good Friday at 7pm). Livestreamed and available online. Runs April 3-12.
events.venue_name: National Shrine of The Divine Mercy

events.title: Divine Mercy Weekend
events.notes: April 11 (Eve): 9am-5pm Confessions, 3pm Solemn Novena (Mother of Mercy Outdoor Shrine), 4pm Divine Mercy Sunday Mass (Outdoor Shrine). April 12 (Divine Mercy Sunday): NO regular 9am/10:30am/2pm Mass. 9am-5pm Confessions, 1pm Solemn Mass (Outdoor Shrine). Broadcast live on EWTN at Noon, available on Facebook (DivineMercyOfficial) and TheDivineMercy.org. Volunteers needed: ShrineofDivineMercy.org/volunteer or 413-298-1114.

events.title: Breakfast with the Easter Bunny
events.notes: St. Michael's K of C #9960 & Family Life Committee. Pancakes, sausage, fruit cup, hot chocolate, coffee & juice. Adults $7, Children 5-12 $5, 4 & under free. Tickets at the door. Pictures with the Easter Bunny & arts and crafts. Accepting non-perishable food donations for the Open Pantry.

events.title: Family Bingo Night
events.notes: Doors open 5pm, Bingo starts 6pm. Sponsored by St. Michael's Family Life Committee. All ages welcome. Funds support St. Michael's Outreach and Ministry programs.

events.title: Lenten Taizé Candlelight Prayer Service
events.notes: Taizé Evening of Prayer — singing of psalm verses and simple chants, alternating with periods of silent reflection in candlelight. Snow date: Wednesday, March 11 at 7pm.

events.title: Pray the Rosary
events.notes: In the church. Bring your rosary beads. Email prayer intentions via stmichaelsel.org/get-involved/our-ministry/prayer-line.

events.title: Lenten Evening of Prayer
events.notes: At Our Lady of Mt. Carmel, Springfield. Confessions 6:15-6:45pm, Holy Mass at 7pm with witness by Maureen Digan (miraculous healing recognized for St. Faustina's beatification). Anointing of the Sick after Mass. Refreshments at 8pm in the Center. Sponsored by Spiritual Life Committee and Women's Guild.
